checks.name: frozen-scope
checks.detail: Spec was frozen before production edits and limited the task to Docker app image pnpm activation reliability.

checks.name: dockerfile-change-scope
checks.detail: Only infra/Dockerfile.app was changed in production code; installer launch semantics and Compose topology were not changed.

checks.name: pnpm-activation
checks.detail: Docker build activates packageManager pnpm@10.0.0 with Corepack before pnpm install and prints version 10.0.0.

checks.name: compose-startup
checks.detail: The original installer Compose up command succeeded on retry and started API, worker, bot, miniapp, prometheus, and grafana.

checks.name: post-launch-health
checks.detail: docker compose ps shows API, bot, miniapp, and worker healthy; doctor and verify both returned pass with no findings.
